blended.narrative: Mt. Seymour is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,249 ft. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
